title: Dean Hadley
extract:
Dean Hadley (born 5 August 1992) is an English professional rugby league footballer who plays as a second-row, loose forward, prop and hooker for Hull Kingston Rovers in the Super League and the England Knights at international level.
He has played for Hull F.C. in the Super League, and spent time on loan from Hull at the York City Knights in the Championship, Doncaster in League 1, and Wakefield Trinity and Hull Kingston Rovers in the Super League.
